pr.title: feat: Ship hull CAD module with full CFD workflow integration
pr.body:
Adds a parametric ship hull CAD module to the TensorLBM platform, enabling an end-to-end workflow: **CAD modelling в†’ pre-processing в†’ LBM fluid simulation в†’ post-processing** вЂ” all from the browser UI.

## New library module: `src/tensorlbm/ship_cad.py`

Three standard hull forms with analytical block coefficients:

| Hull | Form | Cb (theoretical) |
|------|------|-----------------|
| Wigley | `(1в€’ОңВІ)(1в€’(1в€’О¶)ВІ)` | 4/9 в‰€ 0.444 |
| Series 60 | `(1в€’ОңВІ)^0.51 В· О¶^0.30` | 0.600 |
| KCS | `(1в€’ОңВІ)^0.45 В· О¶^0.24` | 0.651 |

Key exports:
- `series60_hull_mask` / `kcs_hull_mask` вЂ” 3D boolean voxel masks (same interface as existing `wigley_hull_mask`)
- `hull_block_coefficient` / `hull_statistics` вЂ” Cb, Cwp, Cm, Cp, L/B, B/T
- `generate_hull_previews` вЂ” 3-panel matplotlib figure (body plan + waterplane + side profile)
- `export_hull_stl` вЂ” ASCII STL export
- `build_hull_mask` вЂ” unified wrapper for all hull types
- `ship_lbm_parameters` вЂ” converts physical ship dimensions в†’ LBM П„, Ma, Re, Fr

```python
from tensorlbm import build_ship_hull_mask, hull_statistics, ship_lbm_parameters

mask, stats = build_ship_hull_mask("series60", nx=160, ny=60, nz=40,
                                    length=80, beam=8, draft=12)
# stats: {"Cb": 0.6, "Cwp": ..., "Cm": ..., "solid_cells": ..., ...}

params = ship_lbm_parameters(length_m=100.0, speed_ms=5.0, froude_target=0.25)
# params: {"re_physical": ..., "lbm_tau": ..., "stable": True, ...}
```

## Platform integration

**REST API** вЂ” `platform/backend/routers/cad.py` (mounted at `/api/cad/`):
- `POST /preview` вЂ” multi-view hull figure + form coefficients
- `POST /hull-mask` вЂ” 3D voxel mask with top-view PNG
- `POST /lbm-parameters` вЂ” physical в†’ LBM parameter conversion
- `POST /send-to-solver` вЂ” submit hull LBM job directly from CAD params (Series 60/KCS achieved via monkey-patching `wigley_hull_mask` inside the existing `run_ship_hull_flow` runner)
- `POST /export-stl` вЂ” STL file download

**Frontend** вЂ” new **CAD** tab in `index.html`:
- Hull type selector + parametric form (L, B, T, stations)
- Live multi-view preview panel
- Physical в†’ LBM parameter calculator (with Froude target override)
- 3D voxel mask generator
- "Launch LBM Solver" panel that submits directly and navigates to Post-process

## Tests
35 new tests in `tests/test_ship_cad.py` covering mask shapes, Cb ordering (KCS > Series60 > Wigley), form coefficient keys, section/profile extraction, preview figure generation, STL validity, and full CADв†’maskв†’Cb workflow.
pr.author: Copilot
